title: Could Shinji and Asuka worked as a couple
display_title: Could Shinji and Asuka worked as a couple
wikitext:
[]: Could Shinji and Asuka worked as a couple? Post by Th3Marauder » Sun Jan 12, 2014 2:12 am I'm putting this in Chit Chat and not Discussion because as far as I'm concerned (and I know thats a dangerous sentence when talking about Eva ) everything we need to know about Shinji and Asuka's relationship in the series is there on the screen. Asuka needs love, yet she (probably rightly) finds Shinji's pure physical need for her disgusting. But my question is, in another world (yes like Angelic Days and all that) could Asuka and Shinji have made it work? If they'd prevented Third Impact, destroyed SEELE, all that good stuff, do you think they had the makings of a couple? Or would it have remained the same, with their own major flaws preventing anything other than play kissing when Misato's out?

[]: Post by Chuckman » Sun Jan 12, 2014 2:17 am They are destined lovers and I refuse to hear otherwise.

[]: Post by NemZ » Sun Jan 12, 2014 2:44 am I will point you HERE as probably the most relevant thread for such a discussion that has come up over and over again, especially since the phrasing of your question puts it squarely in fanfic land.
